notes: 1byhalf system is used to reach specific C3 y targets
System combines base tip from CO with correction from C3

result_policy.description: Primary output is first cushion position (C1)

hp_policy.description: Spin is derived by summing base and correction tips

notes: C3 target y determines correction tip value
Corner RIGHT mirrors C1 x-coordinate after derivation
Track choice does not depend on numeric comparison; it is canonical
